name: Doc Optimizer
description: Iteratively improve technical documentation through autonomous score-refine loops with deterministic codebase verification.
longDescription:
Combines **6 deterministic verifiers** (code examples compile, import paths exist, API endpoints match routes, symbol signatures match, internal links resolve, version numbers current) with **5 LLM-judged criteria** (accuracy against codebase, completeness, sequencing/prerequisites, example quality, audience appropriateness).

Scans the associated codebase to verify every claim in the docs — broken code examples, stale function signatures, and dead links are caught automatically. Hard constraints auto-revert any change that breaks working examples or resolved links.

Handles API docs, guides, READMEs, tutorials, and JSDoc/docstring source annotations. Includes live `dashboard.html`. Supports full, audit-only, focused, and `skip-deterministic` modes.
